seoTitle: Hughes vs Hume — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hughes and Hume. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hughes and Hume.
heading: Hughes vs Hume — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hughes, Australian Capital Territory and Hume, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hughes and Hume have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Hughes or Hume safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hughes has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Hume scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hughes scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Hume scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hughes or Hume?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hughes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
